category_sources: source_facts.description says it triggers notifications when a process completes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is noti; source_facts.homepage points to the official Codeberg project named noti.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI notification tool for completed processes; source_facts.homepage identifies the official project.
